# Tri-Point Landscaping LLC

## Business Overview
Tri-Point Landscaping LLC is a professional, locally owned landscaping and lawn care company serving Macomb County, Michigan. Founded and operated by a local team committed to precision, passion, and perfection on every property.

- **Phone**: (586) 327-8080
- **Text**: (586) 327-8080
- **Email**: tripointlandscaping@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://tripointlandscaping.com
- **Rating**: 5.0★ on Google
- **License**: Fully insured LLC
- **Free Estimates**: Yes

## Service Areas
Tri-Point Landscaping serves the following cities and townships in Macomb County, Michigan:
- Washington Township, MI
- Shelby Township, MI
- Macomb Township, MI
- Romeo, MI
- Ray Township, MI
- Bruce Township, MI

## Services Offered

### Lawn Maintenance
Weekly mowing, edging, trimming, and blowing for residential and commercial properties throughout Macomb County.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/services/lawn-maintenance

### Landscaping & Design
Custom landscape design and installation including bed creation, planting, borders, and full property transformations.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/services/landscaping

### Mulch & Stone Installation
Supply and installation of decorative mulch and stone for garden beds and landscape areas.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/services/mulch-and-stone

### Seasonal Cleanup
Spring and fall cleanups including leaf removal, bed cleanup, edging, and property prep.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/services/seasonal-cleanup

### Snow Removal & Ice Management
Residential and commercial snow plowing, salting, and ice management throughout Macomb County winters.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/services/snow-removal

### Lawn Renovations & Aeration
Aeration, overseeding, dethatching, and complete lawn renovations to restore thin or damaged turf.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/services/lawn-renovations

### Commercial Landscaping
Full-service commercial lawn maintenance, landscaping, and snow removal for commercial properties in Macomb County.
More info: https://tripointlandscaping.com/commercial

- 5.0★ Google rated
- Locally owned and operated in Washington Township, MI
- Fully insured LLC
- Free estimates — call or text (586) 327-8080
- Available 24/7 for calls and texts
- Serving hundreds of properties across Macomb County every season

## Frequently Asked Questions
Full FAQ: https://tripointlandscaping.com/faq

**How much does lawn care cost in Macomb County?**
Most residential weekly mowing packages start in the $40–$80 range per visit depending on property size. Free estimates available.

**What areas do you serve?**
Washington Township, Shelby Township, Macomb Township, Romeo, Ray Township, and Bruce Township — all in Macomb County, Michigan.

**Are you insured?**
Yes. Tri-Point Landscaping is a fully insured LLC.

**Do you offer free estimates?**
Yes. Call or text (586) 327-8080 for a free, no-obligation estimate.

**Do you offer commercial services?**
Yes. We serve commercial properties throughout Macomb County for lawn maintenance, landscaping, and snow removal.
